page.title: Integrations · Epistola
page.description: Native adapters for GZAC, Valtimo, and ZGW APIs. Integrate Epistola into Common Ground platforms or any system over HTTPS.

hero.title: Plug Epistola into Common Ground platforms in days.
hero.description: Use our adapters for GZAC, Valtimo, and ZGW APIs or integrate any product over HTTPS.

process.title: From payload mapping to delivery in three steps.

steps.title: Map your data
steps.description: Align your zaak, besluit, or custom payloads with template variables.

steps.title: Link orchestrator
steps.description: Call Epistola over HTTPS or message queue, send JSON, and await the PDF response.

steps.title: Deliver documents
steps.description: Push finished files into your DMS, send to citizens, or attach back to the case system.

page.title: Integraties · Epistola
page.description: Native adapters voor GZAC, Valtimo, en ZGW APIs. Integreer Epistola in Common Ground platforms of elk systeem via HTTPS.

hero.title: Plug Epistola in Common Ground platforms binnen dagen.
hero.description: Gebruik onze adapters voor GZAC, Valtimo, en ZGW APIs of integreer elk product via HTTPS.

process.title: Van payload mapping naar levering in drie stappen.

steps.title: Map je data
steps.description: Lijn je zaak, besluit, of custom payloads uit met template variabelen.

steps.title: Koppel orchestrator
steps.description: Roep Epistola aan via HTTPS of message queue, stuur JSON, en wacht op het PDF antwoord.

steps.title: Lever documenten
steps.description: Push voltooide bestanden naar je DMS, stuur naar burgers, of koppel terug aan het zaaksysteem.
